name: Insalata Tiepida Di Mare
recipeIngredient: 4 small squid, peeled and cleaned, whole
12 crayfish, boiled and shelled, reserving the shells
1 tablespoon hot red pepper, fresh, thinly sliced
1 bunch mint, leaves removed, to yield 1/4 cup
2 cups wild bitter greens, washed and spun dry (can substitute baby mustard mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 quarts water to a boil and add 1 teaspoon salt and 4 tablespoons red wine vinegar.
2. Add mussels, octopus, and prawns; cook for 1 minute until prawns redden and mussels start to open.
3. Add squid and crayfish; cook for another 1 minute until squid is just translucent.
4. Drain the seafood in a warm bowl.
5. Add scallions, vinegar, olive oil, hot red pepper slices, salt, pepper, and mint; toss to coat.
6. Add greens; toss again.
7. Serve warm with lemon wedges.
Yield: 4 servings
